allow: PowerShell($homepage = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\hyunjung\\Downloads\\chlwhd.html" -Raw; $index = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\hyunjung\\Documents\\beeliber_ui\\index.html" -Raw; $styleStart = $homepage.IndexOf\('<style>'\) + 7; $styleEnd = $homepage.IndexOf\('</style>'\); $homepageStyle = $homepage.Substring\($styleStart, $styleEnd - $styleStart\); $bodyStart = $homepage.IndexOf\('<body>'\) + 6; $bodyEnd = $homepage.IndexOf\('</body>'\); $homepageBody = $homepage.Substring\($bodyStart, $bodyEnd - $bodyStart\); Write-Output "Style length: $\($homepageStyle.Length\), Body length: $\($homepageBody.Length\)"; $homeTag = '<section class="screen" id="home"'; $homeIdx = $index.IndexOf\($homeTag\); Write-Output "Home tag found at: $homeIdx")
